decisions.briefing: Markets were mixed today — the S&P 500 edged up 0.1% while the NASDAQ slipped 0.4%, suggesting tech names faced mild selling pressure while broader cyclicals held up. With only $226.69 cash on hand (below the $500 threshold), no new positions can be opened despite 4 available slots. All six existing holdings remain within their stop-loss and profit-target bands, so the right move is to sit tight and let momentum play out.

market_education.summary_en: Today's session showed a mild bifurcation between tech and broader equities, with the NASDAQ falling 0.4% while the S&P 500 gained 0.1%. This kind of divergence often reflects sector rotation — investors trimming high-multiple tech positions and redeploying into value, energy, or defensive names. Without a specific catalyst to break the pattern, the market is effectively in a consolidation phase as traders await the next macro signal.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場出現輕微分化走勢，那斯達克指數下跌0.4%，而標普500指數則微升0.1%。這種背離往往反映資金輪動跡象——投資者適度減持高估值科技股，轉而布局價值股、能源或防禦性板塊。在缺乏明確催化劑的情況下，市場整體處於整固階段，等待下一個宏觀訊號指引方向。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Index divergence occurs when two major indices move in opposite directions on the same day — like today's NASDAQ falling while the S&P 500 rose. It signals sector rotation: money is flowing out of one group (tech) and into another (industrials, energy, financials). Savvy investors watch divergences to spot which sectors are gaining or losing favor before those trends become obvious.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 指數背離是指兩個主要指數在同一天朝不同方向移動的現象——就像今日那斯達克下跌而標普500上漲。這通常意味著資金輪動正在發生：資金從某類板塊（如科技股）流出，轉入其他板塊（如工業、能源、金融）。有經驗的投資者往往透過觀察指數背離，提早捕捉板塊強弱變化的先機。
